name: Framed
overview: Starring Mimi Lana, a disillusioned journalist stumbles across an old polaroid camera showing pictures of tragic events from the future. Teaming up with a group of vigilantes, she embarks on missions to rescue innocent lives. But soon, the pictures begin to reveal secrets of a larger conspiracy – one that is closely tied to the death of her mother 10 years ago.

trailers.title: FRAMED | CAN YOU CHANGE YOUR FATE? | OFFICIAL TRAILER | 3RD MAY 2024
Framed | Promo Episod 1 & 2 | "KAU YANG BUNH ABANG AKU!"
